signals.headline: Cooper Flagg Confirmed Available for Mavericks vs
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg Confirmed Available for Mavericks vs. Raptors Playoff Game | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Dallas Mavericks rookie Cooper Flagg is officially available and good to go for the playoff matchup against the Toronto Raptors, with head coach Jason Kidd confirming a minutes restriction of 20-25 minutes due to a compressed schedule following his recent ankle sprain recovery[3]. This comes after F
